constraints.consistency: must agree with the number of members; never claim more roles than the roster renders

constraints.order: seniority / accountability first — the single accountable lead is item 1

kind.description: selects the Solar glyph painted inside .av (lead=star, strategy=magnifer, content=pen, technical=settings, data=chart); never authored as an icon name

dedication.description: written verbatim into .pct including the % sign — the renderer does not append it

presentation.composition: brand intro panel + a cohesive roster of 3–5 member cards; icon, avatar disc and the 'dedicación' caption are fixed chrome
presentation.staffingPolicy: every declared role must be a real, staffable role with a real dedication; the single accountable lead is mandatory and is always item 1
presentation.rendererNote: the roster is emitted by the inline <script> from the `team` array; the composer must operate on the RENDERED DOM (post-script), not on the raw HTML string, or de-script the template first
